title: The Secret of the Tomb
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part focuses on the royal tomb and the poneglyph. Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, King Cobra, Luffy, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: What kind of scent is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I don't know, just try it out!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Then is it inside some building...!?

summary: Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
